Wenatchee Limo Service

Premium luxury transportation serving Wenatchee and surrounding areas

BOOK NOW (206) 595-9675

Elegant Wenatchee limo service to Pangborn Memorial Airport, downtown hotels, apple orchards, wine country tours, corporate events, and Columbia River venues. Apple Capital luxury transportation.

Services Available in Wenatchee

Airport Transfers

Reliable transportation to/from SEA-TAC, Boeing Field, and Paine Field airports.

Learn More →

Hourly Charters

Flexible luxury transportation for business meetings, tours, and special events.

Learn More →

Executive Transportation

Professional chauffeur service for executives and business professionals.

Learn More →

Wedding Transportation

Elegant limousine service for your special day with champagne and red carpet.

Learn More →

Special Occasions

Luxury transportation for birthdays, proms, anniversaries, and celebrations.

Learn More →

Game Day Transport

Safe transportation to Seahawks, Mariners, Sounders, and Kraken games.

Learn More →

Why Choose Emerald City Limos in Wenatchee

24/7 Availability

Round-the-clock service whenever you need us in Wenatchee

Professional Chauffeurs

Experienced drivers familiar with all Wenatchee routes

Luxury Fleet

Premium vehicles maintained to the highest standards
